title: A Slime Mod
description: In this Minecraft mod, you will find a mod with slime, for example when you want to craft items like leads and you don't want to spend hours looking for slime, then this mod is made for you. Thanks
body: Welcome to A Slime Mod! This mod will be very useful in your Minecraft adventure. For example, don't want to spend hours looking for slimes? Then this mod is your help! In this mod, you will find slime ores by breaking a green ore with a pickaxe. When you obtain three, you can create a slime sword or pickaxe, or transform the three slime ores into slime balls, for example, to make leads. You can also craft a slime armor! So don't wait any longer and install A Slime Mod!
